title: Graphorkis milnei
taxonomy: Graphorkis milnei is a species of orchid. It is a member of the genus Graphorkis, which is a group of terrestrial orchids. Graphorkis milnei is classified within the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. This species is native to tropical Africa, specifically in countries such as South Africa, Kenya, and Tanzania. The classification of Graphorkis milnei is further refined within the subfamily Orchidoideae and tribe Orchideae.

It is believed to aid in the treatment of various health issues, including fever and digestive problems. The plant is also used to alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs.
